message:
refactor(demo_showcase): Improve code formatting and structure

app.rs:
- Fix match arm indentation in ansi_to_html() for consistent style
- Align all match cases to same indentation level
- No functional changes, pure formatting improvement

cli.rs:
- Minor refinement

components/sidebar.rs:
- Simplify sidebar component logic
- Reduce code complexity

data modules:
- animation.rs, async_runner.rs, mod.rs, simulation.rs
- Cleaner data handling patterns

pages:
- dashboard.rs, docs.rs, files.rs, jobs.rs, wizard.rs
- Consistent page structure refinements

test_support.rs:
- Updated test helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
